title: Dark Mode Table Gridlines, Search Text Color, and Nav Hover Fixes
story: As a DataTools Pro user in dark mode, I want table gridlines, search input text, and navigation hover states to be properly visible and readable, so that the dark mode experience is fully usable.
description:
Three dark mode CSS issues affecting readability and visual consistency.

## Issues and Fixes
1. **Table gridlines**: Gridlines are too visually prominent in dark mode. Change border color to `#404b6f` for both cell borders and the top/bottom table border to create a subtler look.
2. **Search input text**: Search box text turns dark in dark mode, making it unreadable. Fix: ensure search input text is light/white.
3. **Navigation hover**: Top-level navigation text turns darker on hover in dark mode, making it hard to read. Fix: make hover text white instead.
acceptance_criteria: DataTable gridlines use #404b6f border color in dark mode
Table top and bottom borders match the gridline color in dark mode
Search input text is light/white in dark mode for readability
Top navigation hover text is white in dark mode
ux_changes: Dark mode CSS fixes: table gridlines softened to #404b6f, search input text changed to white for readability, navigation hover text changed to white.
implementation_notes: CSS-only changes targeting dark mode selectors. Table border color #404b6f applied to both cell borders and table outer borders for consistency. Search input and nav hover colors overridden for dark mode readability.
comment_summary: Developer implemented all three fixes and pushed to staging for review.
